ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for housing data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "housing_score" REAL /* Housing quality score */,
  "affordability_index" REAL /* Housing affordability index */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  "rental_prices" REAL /* Rental prices */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the housing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for cost of living data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "cost_score" REAL /* Cost of living score */,
  "expense_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of expenses */,
  "housing_cost" REAL /* Housing cost */,
  "food_cost" REAL /* Food cost */,
  "transport_cost" REAL /* Transport cost */,
  "utilities_cost" REAL /* Utilities cost */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the cost of living data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_opportunities" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for economic opportunities data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "startup_score" REAL /* Startup ecosystem score */,
  "venture_capital_score" REAL /* Venture capital availability score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "number_of_startups" INTEGER /* Number of startups */,
  "venture_capital_investment" REAL /* Venture capital investment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic opportunities data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_opportunities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_connectivity" (
  "connectivity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for travel connectivity data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "connectivity_score" REAL /* Connectivity score */,
  "transport_modes" TEXT /* List of available transport modes */,
  "number_of_airports" INTEGER /* Number of airports */,
  "number_of_train_stations" INTEGER /* Number of train stations */,
  "average_air_fare" REAL /* Average air fare */,
  "average_train_fare" REAL /* Average train fare */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the travel connectivity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connectivity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_connectivity_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commute" (
  "commute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for commute data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "commute_score" REAL /* Commute convenience score */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average commute time in minutes */,
  "public_transport_coverage" REAL /* Public transport coverage */,
  "traffic_congestion_index" REAL /* Traffic congestion index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the commute data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commute_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_freedom" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for business freedom data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Business freedom score */,
  "regulatory_environment" TEXT /* Regulatory environment description */,
  "business_registration_time" REAL /* Time required to register a business */,
  "number_of_regulatory_hurdles" INTEGER /* Number of regulatory hurdles */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the business freedom data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_freedom_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for safety data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "safety_score" REAL /* Safety score */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 inhabitants */,
  "number_of_crimes_reported" INTEGER /* Number of crimes reported */,
  "police_force_density" REAL /* Police force density */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the safety data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for healthcare data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Healthcare quality score */,
  "facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities */,
  "number_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals */,
  "number_of_doctors_per_1000_people" REAL /* Number of doctors per 1000 people */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the healthcare data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "education_score" REAL /* Education quality score */,
  "schools_count" INTEGER /* Number of schools */,
  "number_of_universities" INTEGER /* Number of universities */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_quality" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for environmental quality data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "environment_score" REAL /* Environmental quality score */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Pollution level description */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Green space percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the environmental quality data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_quality_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxation" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for taxation data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "tax_score" REAL /* Taxation score */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Average tax rate */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate */,
  "sales_tax_rate" REAL /* Sales tax rate */,
  "income_tax_rate" REAL /* Income tax rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the taxation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_access" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for internet access data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "internet_score" REAL /* Internet access quality score */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average internet speed in Mbps */,
  "broadband_penetration_rate" REAL /* Broadband penetration rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the internet access data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leisure_culture" (
  "leisure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for leisure and culture data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "leisure_score" REAL /* Leisure and culture quality score */,
  "attractions_count" INTEGER /* Number of leisure attractions */,
  "number_of_parks" INTEGER /* Number of parks */,
  "number_of_museums" INTEGER /* Number of museums */,
  "number_of_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters */,
  "number_of_sports_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of sports facilities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the leisure and culture data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leisure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leisure_culture_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
